questionTitle: cy Are you applying for yourself or someone else?

myself.label: cy I am applying for myself
myself.hint: cy Including if you are applying with joint tenants on the same agreement

someoneElse.label: cy I am applying on behalf of someone else
someoneElse.hint: cy As a legal or non-legal representative

applyingForYourselfOrSomeoneElse.required: cy Select whether you are applying for yourself or someone else
